title: Team Strong Women calls for unity
description: GEORGE NEWS - The community of George is...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The community of George is invited to a special day of prayer hosted by Team Strong Women at the Rosemoor Club House on Sunday 10 August, starting at 15:00.


> Under the leadership of Linda Smit, this event aims to call churches, institutions and individuals to collective prayer amid growing challenges facing the nation, particularly violence against children and families.


"We are sounding the trumpet and asking everyone to respond by coming together to seek God's face in humility and unity," said the organisers.

The day of prayer will include moments of confession, intercession and hope as the community joins hearts to pray for South Africa, its youth and its future.

Everyone is welcome.

Enquiries: Maria on 060 412 6322, Dora on 063 446 0711 or Linda on 078 180 5909, or email [email protected].

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
